pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.

src/main/java/com/javatechie/dto/Course..general_idea: Add Lombok @Builder annotation to enable builder pattern for the Course DTO.

src/main/java/com/javatechie/service/Cou.general_idea: Initialize the courses list with hardcoded sample data instead of an empty list.
src/main/java/com/javatechie/service/Cou.before: private final List<Course> courses = new ArrayList<>();

template.yml.general_idea: Add a new output for the LocalStack Lambda API URL to support local development and testing.
template.yml.after:
LocalStackLambdaApiPing:
    Description: URL for Lambda application running on Localstack
    Value: !Sub 'http://${ServerlessRestApi}.execute-api.localhost.localstack.cloud:4566/Prod/ping'
    Export:
      Name: LocalStackLambdaApiPing

template.yml.general_idea: Rename the existing Cloud API output to distinguish it from the new LocalStack output.
template.yml.before:
SpringBootLambdaApi:
    Description: URL for application
    Value: !Sub 'https://${ServerlessRestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/Prod/ping'
    Export:
      Name: SpringBootLambdaApi
template.yml.after:
CloudLambdaApi:
    Description: URL for application when App is deployed to AWS Cloud
    Value: !Sub 'https://${ServerlessRestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/Prod/ping'
    Export:
      Name: CloudLambdaApi
